T067_card_redesign.before: Plain white/dark form panel, standard borders, system font
T067_card_redesign.after: Dark parchment gradient, Celtic corner accents, Georgia serif, gold verb labels, faction dots, biome badge, gold divider

T066_ambient_audio.before: Complete silence during menu and 3D walk
T066_ambient_audio.after: Menu: 55Hz drone + wind noise. Forest: 65Hz drone + wind + bird chirps (random 4-12s). 2s fade-in, 1.5s fade-out

T068_effect_preview.before: Blind choice — no preview of card effects before committing
T068_effect_preview.after: Hover tooltip shows all effects per option: color-coded positive/negative/neutral with icons

T069_boot_skip.before: Fixed 2.6s boot wait regardless of player intent
T069_boot_skip.after: Any click or keydown skips remaining wait. Listener cleanup on resolve (no leak).

top_next_priority: T070 — HUD faction bars (player has no visibility into reputation standings mid-run)
second_priority: T072 — Ambient audio deferred bug (silent menu when user does not interact during boot)
